info.title: MedIncident Command Service API
info.description: Command-side (write) API for the medical incident reporting system. Handles organizations, employees, roles, classifications, leaves, and incidents.

put.description:
Updates a category's name, description, or parent.
To move a category to root level, omit parent_id. Parent changes are validated for cycles.

post.description: Creates a new incident type within the specified category.
Creates a new department within the specified clinic.

delete.description: Hard-deletes the employee and all associated roles, leaves, and deputies.

post.description:
Starts an immediate leave for the specified employee (starts_at = now).
The employee must not have an active overlapping leave.

Schedules a future leave for the specified employee.
starts_at must be in the future and must not overlap with existing leaves.
Transitions an incident from CREATED to ACCEPTED status.
Transitions an incident from CREATED to CANCELLED status.
Transitions an incident from ACCEPTED to COMPLETED status.

put.description:
Updates the description of an incident. Only allowed while the incident is in CREATED status.
Patients cannot edit.

post.description: Transitions an incident from ACCEPTED to REJECTED status.
Cancels a scheduled leave that has not yet started.
Ends an active leave immediately (sets ends_at = now).

Creates a new incident category within the specified organization.
If parent_id is set, the parent must belong to the same organization (cycle prevention enforced).
Creates a new clinic within the specified organization.
Registers a user as an employee within the specified organization and department.

Registers a new incident within the specified organization.
Patients may register if the incident type allows patient_can_register.
Creates a user from an existing Zitadel identity.

put.description: Allows the authenticated user to update their own profile.

post.description:
Validates given_name, family_name, and middle_name against business rules.
Returns per-field validation results. Does not create any entities.

code.description: Machine-readable violation code (e.g. REQUIRED, TOO_LONG, MIXED_SCRIPTS).

v1FieldViolation.description: FieldViolation describes a single validation error for a specific field.

v1PersonName.description: PersonName represents a person's full name.

v1PhysicalAddress.description: PhysicalAddress represents a physical address with optional GPS coordinates.
